nasb.text: But beyond this, my son, be warned: the writing of many books is endless, and excessive devotion to books is wearying to the body.

esv.text: My son, beware of anything beyond these. Of making many books there is no end, and much study is a weariness of the flesh.

cnv.text: 我兒，還有，你當受勸勉：著書多，沒有窮盡；讀書多，身體疲倦。

ccb.text: 我亲爱的儿子，还有一件事，你要听我的忠告：著书多，没有穷尽；读书多，身体疲劳。

csbs.text: 我儿啊，除了这些以外，你还当受劝诫：著书再多，没有穷尽；多做研究，肉体疲倦。
